paper_title: Refinement of a conjecture on positive square energy of graphs
summary: Conjecture 9.3 appears in the open problems section (Section 9) of arXiv:2506.07264, where the authors characterize the equality case s^+(G)=n of their main conjecture (Conjecture 1.2) as being achieved precisely by bipartite unicyclic graphs. The conjecture is motivated by computational evidence and the structural properties of bipartite unicyclic graphs. No follow-up paper addressing or resolving this conjecture was found in a broad web search covering the period June 2025 through May 2026.
search_queries: Akbari Kumar Mohar Pragada Zhang "positive square energy" bipartite unicyclic 2506.07264
Akbari Mohar "square energy" graph "s+(G) = n" unicyclic characterization 2025 2026
notes: No follow-up found. The conjecture is very recent (June 2025) and sits in the open problems section of the source paper. The related paper arXiv:2604.15656 on positive and negative p-energies was examined but does not address this specific conjecture. The equality characterisation s^+(G)=n <=> bipartite unicyclic is supported by computational evidence only.
